summary:
The brain continues significant developmental processes after birth, making it a primary focus given its prolonged period of maturation compared to other parts of the body which may be more fully developed or functional immediately upon delivery.
```
``` ```markdown
The brain undergoes considerable further development post-birth, while many other organs reach maturity before delivery. This extended neurological maturation makes the brain the standout example of an underdeveloped system at birth.
```
